products.title: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra 5G
products.description: The Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra features a 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor, 12GB RAM and 256GB storage. Built-in S Pen for precision work with advanced AI-powered camera features and 200MP main sensor.

products.title: OnePlus 12 5G
products.description: OnePlus 12 features Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 chipset with up to 16GB RAM and 512GB storage. Hasselblad-tuned triple camera system, 100W SUPERVOOC charging, and a stunning 6.82-inch LTPO AMOLED display.

products.title: Xiaomi Redmi Note 13 Pro+ 5G
products.description: Redmi Note 13 Pro+ features a 200MP OIS camera with Dimensity 7200 Ultra processor. The 6.67-inch AMOLED display offers 120Hz refresh rate and the 5000mAh battery supports 120W HyperCharge for fast charging.

products.title: HP Pavilion 15 Laptop
products.description: HP Pavilion 15 is powered by 13th Gen Intel Core i5 processor with 16GB DDR4 RAM and 512GB NVMe SSD. Features a 15.6-inch FHD IPS display, Intel Iris Xe graphics, and Wi-Fi 6E connectivity for seamless productivity.

products.title: Dell Inspiron 14 Laptop
products.description: Dell Inspiron 14 combines AMD Ryzen 5 7530U processor with 8GB RAM and 512GB SSD. The 14-inch FHD Anti-glare display and compact design make it ideal for students and professionals on the go.

products.title: boAt Rockerz 550 Wireless Headphone
products.description: boAt Rockerz 550 delivers immersive sound with 40mm dynamic drivers and up to 20 hours of battery life. Foldable, ergonomic design with plush ear cushions and built-in mic for hands-free calling.

products.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Cancelling Headphone
products.description: Sony WH-1000XM5 features industry-leading noise cancelling with Auto NC Optimizer. Up to 30 hours battery, multipoint connection, quick charging, and crystal clear hands-free calling for audiophiles.

products.title: Samsung 55 inch 4K QLED Smart TV
products.description: Samsung Q60C QLED TV delivers vibrant 4K resolution with Quantum Color technology and Direct Full Array backlighting. Smart Tizen OS, Object Tracking Sound, and Gaming Mode make it a complete entertainment hub.

products.title: Canon EOS 1500D DSLR Camera
products.description: Canon EOS 1500D packs a 24.1MP APS-C CMOS sensor with DIGIC 4+ image processor. Full HD video recording, 9-point AF, Wi-Fi and NFC connectivity, and Creative Auto mode for beginners and enthusiasts alike.

products.title: Apple iPad 10th Gen
products.description: Apple iPad 10th generation features A14 Bionic chip, 10.9-inch Liquid Retina display, and 12MP front and rear cameras. USB-C connectivity, Wi-Fi 6, and all-day battery life for work and entertainment.

products.title: Noise ColorFit Pro 4 Smartwatch
products.description: Noise ColorFit Pro 4 features a 1.72-inch TFT LCD display with 100+ sports modes and continuous SpO2 and heart rate monitoring. Built-in Alexa, 7-day battery life, and IP68 water resistance.

products.title: JBL Flip 6 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
products.description: JBL Flip 6 features powerful JBL Pro Sound with 30W output, IP67 waterproof and dustproof rating, and up to 12 hours of playtime. PartyBoost technology lets you link multiple JBL speakers for louder sound.

products.title: Philips 32 inch LED Smart TV
products.description: Philips 32PHT6815 Smart TV features HD resolution with Pixel Plus HD picture enhancement, built-in Wi-Fi and Android 11, and Dolby Audio for rich sound. Compact size perfect for bedroom or kitchen entertainment.

products.title: Realme Narzo 60 Pro 5G
products.description: Realme Narzo 60 Pro 5G features Dimensity 7050 processor with 8GB RAM, 100MP OIS camera, and AMOLED display with 120Hz refresh rate. 67W SUPERVOOC charging for super-fast top-ups.

products.title: Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3 Laptop
products.description: Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3 packs Intel Core i3 12th Gen with 8GB RAM and 512GB SSD storage. The 15.6-inch FHD display, thin design, and long battery life make it an ideal everyday laptop.

products.title: Allen Solly Men's Regular Fit Formal Shirt
products.description: Allen Solly formal shirt in premium cotton blend fabric. Features a regular fit cut with spread collar and long sleeves. Easy-care finish keeps wrinkles away, perfect for office and business meetings.

products.title: Levi's 511 Slim Fit Jeans
products.description: Levi's 511 Slim Fit jeans offer a modern slim silhouette through thigh and leg opening. Made from premium stretch denim for all-day comfort. Versatile design transitions effortlessly from casual to smart casual.

products.title: W Women's Printed A-Line Kurta
products.description: W kurta in floral printed fabric features an A-line silhouette with round neck and three-quarter sleeves. Made from soft rayon fabric for all-day comfort. Ideal for casual outings and festive occasions.

products.title: Biba Women's Embroidered Anarkali Kurta Set
products.description: Biba Anarkali kurta set features intricate embroidery on georgette fabric with matching palazzo pants and dupatta. A complete ethnic ensemble for festive occasions and traditional celebrations.

products.title: FabIndia Cotton Handloom Saree
products.description: FabIndia handloom saree crafted from pure cotton with traditional woven patterns. Features a contrast border and unstitched blouse piece. Breathable fabric perfect for daily wear and formal occasions.

products.title: Nike Men's Dri-FIT Running T-Shirt
products.description: Nike Dri-FIT technology wicks sweat away from skin and helps keep you dry and comfortable during workouts. Lightweight and breathable mesh fabric with ergonomic seams for unrestricted movement.

products.title: Bata Men's Formal Leather Shoes
products.description: Bata formal leather shoes feature genuine leather upper with cushioned insole for all-day comfort. Classic lace-up design with Goodyear-welted sole for durability and style in the workplace.

products.title: Woodland Men's Outdoor Boots
products.description: Woodland outdoor boots feature genuine leather upper with TEX waterproof membrane to keep feet dry. Rugged rubber outsole with aggressive tread for superior grip on all terrains. Perfect for trekking and outdoor adventures.

products.title: Puma Men's Running Shoes
products.description: Puma Cell Regulate running shoes feature CELL technology in the heel for cushioning and stability. Breathable mesh upper and EVA midsole absorb impact for comfortable long runs.

products.title: Lavie Women's Tote Handbag
products.description: Lavie structured tote bag in premium PU leather with multiple interior compartments. Dual shoulder straps and top handle for versatile carrying. Ample space for daily essentials - laptop, documents, and more.

products.title: HRX by Hrithik Roshan Gym Track Pants
products.description: HRX track pants feature quick-dry active fabric with elastic waistband and drawstring. Side pockets for storage and ribbed cuffs. Ideal for gym workouts, yoga, and outdoor sports activities.

products.title: Van Heusen Men's Slim Fit Chinos
products.description: Van Heusen slim fit chinos crafted from premium cotton stretch fabric for comfort and style. Clean minimal design with flat front and side pockets. Versatile for both office and casual occasions.

products.title: Zara Women's Floral Midi Dress
products.description: Zara midi dress in floral printed fabric with V-neckline and flared skirt. Adjustable straps for a perfect fit. Lightweight chiffon fabric drapes beautifully for a feminine, elegant look.

products.title: US Polo Assn Men's Polo T-Shirt
products.description: US Polo Assn polo t-shirt in premium pique cotton with iconic embroidered polo player logo. Three-button placket, ribbed collar, and cuffs for a polished casual look. Available in multiple colors.

products.title: Adidas Women's Ultraboost Running Shoes
products.description: Adidas Ultraboost features responsive BOOST midsole cushioning with Primeknit+ upper that adapts to your foot shape. Continental rubber outsole provides superior grip on all surfaces for serious runners.

products.title: Aashirvaad Whole Wheat Atta
products.description: Aashirvaad whole wheat atta is made from the best grains sourced from the heart of India. Contains natural wheat germ, making it more nutritious and flavourful for softer rotis and chapatis.

products.title: Fortune Sunflower Oil
products.description: Fortune Sunflower Oil is refined from best quality sunflower seeds. Rich in Vitamins A, D, E and K, it has a light taste and high smoke point making it perfect for everyday Indian cooking.

products.title: Amul Butter Salted
products.description: Amul Butter is made from fresh pasteurized cream of superior quality. Rich, creamy taste that enhances the flavour of any dish. Ideal for spreading on toast, cooking, and baking.

products.title: Tata Salt Iodized
products.description: Tata Salt is India's most trusted salt brand, vacuum evaporated for high purity. Contains optimal levels of iodine for thyroid health. The superior crystal structure ensures consistent taste in all dishes.

products.title: India Gate Basmati Rice Classic
products.description: India Gate Classic Basmati Rice is long grain, aromatic basmati rice from the foothills of Himalayas. Each grain elongates to double on cooking with a distinctive aroma and delicate flavour.

products.title: Tata Tea Gold
products.description: Tata Tea Gold blends long and short whole leaf tea from Assam and Darjeeling for a rich golden taste. The unique brewing process captures freshness and natural tea aroma in every cup.

products.title: MDH Chana Masala Spice Mix
products.description: MDH Chana Masala is a perfectly balanced blend of aromatic spices for authentic chickpea curry. Made from premium quality spices sourced from across India for restaurant-quality taste at home.

products.title: Nestle Maggi 2-Minute Noodles
products.description: Nestle Maggi 2-Minute Noodles are the iconic instant noodles beloved across India. Made with real vegetables and special Masala, they cook in just 2 minutes for a quick satisfying snack any time.

products.title: Saffola Active Refined Blended Oil
products.description: Saffola Active is a scientifically formulated blend of rice bran and soybean oils. Rich in Oryzanol, Vitamin E and MUFA that help maintain good cholesterol. Light taste for everyday healthy cooking.

products.title: Britannia Good Day Cashew Butter Cookies
products.description: Britannia Good Day cookies are made with real cashews for a rich, buttery flavour. Crunchy texture and generous cashew topping make them an irresistible snack for the whole family.

products.title: Amul Full Cream Milk Powder
products.description: Amul Full Cream Milk Powder is spray-dried for freshness and packed with nutrients. High protein content, rich taste suitable for preparing tea, coffee, sweets and various culinary preparations.

products.title: Dabur Honey Pure
products.description: Dabur Honey is 100% pure, natural honey with no added sugar or preservatives. Rich in antioxidants, enzymes and minerals. Perfect for boosting immunity, adding to tea, or as a natural sweetener.

products.title: Everest Rajwadi Garam Masala
products.description: Everest Rajwadi Garam Masala is a premium blend of 21 authentic spices for a royal taste. Roasted and ground to perfection, it adds depth and warmth to curries, biryanis and all Indian dishes.

products.title: Patanjali Desi Ghee
products.description: Patanjali Desi Ghee is prepared from pure cow milk using traditional bilona method. Rich in Vitamin A, D, E and K with anti-inflammatory properties. Adds a rich aroma to dals, rotis and sweets.

products.title: Nescafe Classic Instant Coffee
products.description: Nescafe Classic Instant Coffee is made from 100% pure coffee with a rich, bold flavour profile. The unique freeze-drying process preserves the natural coffee aroma for a perfect cup every time.

products.title: Lakme Absolute Matte Revolution Lipstick
products.description: Lakme Absolute Matte Revolution Lipstick delivers intense colour with a flawless matte finish that lasts up to 16 hours. Enriched with Vitamin E for a smooth, comfortable wear that won't dry your lips.

products.title: Himalaya Purifying Neem Face Wash
products.description: Himalaya Purifying Neem Face Wash with Neem and Turmeric is a soap-free daily face wash that purifies skin and prevents pimples. Gentle formula suitable for oily and acne-prone skin for a clear complexion.

products.title: Mamaearth Vitamin C Moisturizer
products.description: Mamaearth Vitamin C Moisturizer with SPF 20 brightens skin tone and evens out complexion. Made with natural ingredients including Vitamin C and Turmeric that nourish and protect skin from sun damage.

products.title: Dove Intense Repair Shampoo
products.description: Dove Intense Repair Shampoo with Keratin Actives repairs damage from root to tip. Nutritive serum technology penetrates each strand to strengthen hair and reduce breakage for silkier, smoother hair.

products.title: Nivea Soft Light Moisturizer
products.description: Nivea Soft Light Moisturizer is enriched with Vitamin E and Jojoba Oil for deep moisturization. Light, non-greasy formula absorbs instantly for soft, supple skin. Suitable for face, hands and body.

products.title: Garnier Micellar Cleansing Water
products.description: Garnier Micellar Cleansing Water with micelles gently and effectively removes waterproof makeup and impurities without rubbing. No-rinse formula leaves skin clean, soft and perfectly refreshed.

products.title: L'Oreal Paris True Match Foundation
products.description: L'Oreal Paris True Match Super Blendable Liquid Foundation matches skin tone with 33 customizable shades. Micro-matched pigments ensure seamless, natural-looking coverage that lasts all day.

products.title: WOW Skin Science Apple Cider Vinegar Shampoo
products.description: WOW ACV Shampoo with Apple Cider Vinegar balances scalp pH and removes product buildup. Enriched with Argan Oil and Sweet Almond Oil to strengthen hair and add shine. Sulfate-free formula.

products.title: Plum E-Luminence Simply Superior Moisturizer
products.description: Plum E-Luminence moisturizer is rich in Vitamin E and Jojoba for intense hydration. Brightens and evens skin tone with natural plant extracts. 100% vegan, cruelty-free and free from harmful chemicals.

products.title: Biotique Bio Milk Protein Whitening & Rejuvenating Face Pack
products.description: Biotique Bio Milk Protein face pack combines pure milk proteins with honey and Himalayan waters to lighten skin and reduce dark spots. Provides intense nourishment for fair, glowing skin.

products.title: Park Avenue Voyage Eau de Parfum
products.description: Park Avenue Voyage Eau de Parfum is a sophisticated fragrance with fresh top notes of bergamot and sea breeze, heart notes of cedar and vetiver, and a warm base of sandalwood and musk.

products.title: Maybelline Fit Me Matte Poreless Powder
products.description: Maybelline Fit Me Matte + Poreless Powder controls shine and minimizes the look of pores for a naturally matte finish. Micro-fine powder fits seamlessly into skin for a flawlessly smooth look.

products.title: Prestige Popular Aluminium Pressure Cooker
products.description: Prestige Popular Aluminium Pressure Cooker features an inner lid design for convenient use. Made from food-grade aluminium with gasket release mechanism (GRS) for safety. Suitable for gas and induction cooktops.

products.title: Bajaj Mixer Grinder Rex 500W
products.description: Bajaj Rex 500W Mixer Grinder comes with 3 stainless steel jars for grinding, mixing and blending. Powerful 500W motor handles hard ingredients with ease. Anti-skid feet and safety lock for secure operation.

products.title: Solimo 100% Cotton Double Bedsheet Set
products.description: Amazon Solimo bedsheet set includes 1 double bedsheet and 2 pillow covers. Made from 100% pure cotton with 186 TC for a soft, comfortable feel. Vibrant colors remain intact even after multiple washes.

products.title: Godrej InterioSquare 2-Door Wardrobe
products.description: Godrej Interio Square wardrobe features two doors with full-length mirror. Laminated engineered wood with ample storage including hanging rod, shelves and drawers. Pre-assembled for easy setup.

attributes.attributeValue: 90 x 52 x 190 cm (W x D x H)

products.title: Philips LED Bulb 12W Cool White
products.description: Philips 12W LED bulb provides 1100 lumens of bright cool white light with energy savings of up to 80% vs incandescent bulbs. B22 base compatible with standard Indian fittings. Rated for 15,000 hours.

products.title: Cello Opalware Dinner Set 33 Pieces
products.description: Cello Opalware dinner set includes plates, bowls, cups and saucers in elegant design. Made from toughened opal glass that is chip-resistant and food-safe. Microwave and dishwasher safe for easy care.

products.title: Milton Thermosteel Flask 500ml
products.description: Milton Thermosteel Flask with double-wall stainless steel vacuum insulation keeps beverages hot for 24 hours and cold for 24 hours. Leak-proof design with wide mouth and easy-grip body.

products.title: Hawkins Contura Pressure Cooker 3L
products.description: Hawkins Contura hard anodised pressure cooker with contura shape for improved heat distribution. Gasket release mechanism for safety. Includes trivet, separators and ladle in the box.

products.title: Story@Home Non-Slip Bath Mat
products.description: Story@Home cotton bath mat with anti-skid rubber backing keeps you safe on wet bathroom floors. Highly absorbent microfiber surface wicks water quickly. Machine washable and fast drying.

products.title: Pigeon Basics Hard Anodised Non-Stick Tawa
products.description: Pigeon Basics hard anodised tawa with non-stick coating for healthy cooking with minimal oil. PFOA-free coating is safe and durable. Comfortable handle stays cool while cooking on gas stove.

products.title: Amazon Basics Microfiber Pillow 2-Pack
products.description: Amazon Basics microfiber pillows filled with hollow conjugate fibre for supportive and comfortable sleep. Hypoallergenic, breathable cover promotes airflow. Available in standard size for all pillowcases.
products.material: Microfiber Shell with Hollow Fibre Fill

products.title: Nilkamal Plastic Storage Cabinet
products.description: Nilkamal storage cabinet with 2 doors and adjustable shelves provides versatile storage for any room. Durable virgin plastic construction with smooth finish. Lightweight, portable and easy to clean.

attributes.attributeValue: 60 x 40 x 138 cm (W x D x H)

products.title: Havells Cista 1200mm Ceiling Fan
products.description: Havells Cista ceiling fan with BLDC motor consumes only 35W for energy-efficient cooling. Smart compatible with remote control and voice command capability. Anti-dust and anti-rust aluminium blades.
